item.title: Commander Riker’s first mission
item.description:
He looks good in his captains chair
Sigh. Sleeping on the job already.
We had a prep day today, so no students. I brought him to my classroom to explore and help me set up.
He decided to snuggle on one of his new aunts.
Cutie

item.dc:creator: Fulustreka

item.title: An unthemed meme dump
item.description:
I don't know if anyone will read this.
But nearly 14 years ago I met the man of my dreams.
After our first date I called my mom and told her that I'd met the man I was going to marry.
We didn't get married, but we were together for nearly 14 years.
Until last night.
We've been living apart for a while because his dad got sick, and he moved home to help his take care of him. I stayed where we'd lived before, halfway across the country because his parents don't like me. (They think I turned their perfect little boy gay).
We talked every night. For hours. Two nights ago he was hanging out with a friend. Someone we've both known for years.
Told me he loved me when the friend got there, hung up the phone and cheated on me.
Said he didn't plan it. That he didn't mean for it to happen. That he was just feeling lonely and they had a few drinks and were laughing in the living room together one minute and then the next thing he remembers they were in bed together.
When we had our call the day after it happened he told me what had happened and apologized. Like an apology was going to make the betrayal of nearly 14 years of love and affection okay.
He could he come home. If he was feeling lonely. I've been telling him for months how lonely I am. How much I want him to come home. But nope. He couldn't come home cuz his dad still needed him.
So our relationship is over.
And the life I'd built is in ruins.
And I don't knownwhat else to do, because I still have to be a functioning person. But all I want to do is curl up in a ball and cry.
And I'm not ready to tell the real people in my life yet. Because that will make it realer. And I'm not ready for that.
So I'm venting dumping about it here instead.
Sorry.
But if you've read this far, thanks. I appreciate it.
Gotta go back to work now, break is over. Hope you enjoy the cat tax.
Cat tax.
item.dc:creator: OkiyaAuntie

item.title: I rang a bell.
item.description: I forgot to add this to my last post. There was family and staff and clapping and it was very fun and cool but ultra meme level loud. :DDD Previously on, My Cancer : https://imgur.com/gallery/cancer-radiation-update-3-b5HpOEu tldr: cancer, surgery, radiation, bell

item.title: Interpreting Film and Art - Experience

Hopefully Crysta doesn't stumble across it... Artist: Baalbuddy, Source: https://x.com/baalbuddy/status/1628893952270036993 Most Viral Edit: stay hydrated, my thirsty summer friends. Who's a cartoon from your younger years that you had a crush on?

item.title: Images of Note: bad for the skunkie
item.description:
Fuck that guy is short.
Food service is not easy
Anyone gonna call that number?
Fuck now I want a steak bake
I love when they need no translation.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
Oh my
This is your daily reminder that being person of the year doesn't make you a good person, it is given to people who had the most impact on the year.
For the TERF is it not enough to be Cisgender, you must also conform to their very exacting standards.
The Individual is a fucking cool ass name.
:)
O-O
Imagine fucking up this badly
O-O
OwO
I was born with one (1) kidney and a fucked up brain
Imagine your last words being "Rhut row"
love how every single one of these memes feature them being shown grass.
Based
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
